user_query: I want to get better at playing piano. Add a new learning project called 'Piano Practice' and add a task to practice scales for 30 minutes every day.

create_info.description: new project "Piano Practice" with initial task: practice scales — 30 minutes daily

fields.name: Piano Practice
fields.description: Project to improve piano skills. Initial task: Practice scales — 30 minutes daily. Recommend creating a Task child: title 'Practice scales (30 min)', description 'Daily practice of major and minor scales for 30 minutes', status 'Todo', priority 'Medium', due_date null.

result.reasoning: Append new learning project under Learning. Included details for the requested initial daily scales-practice task in the project description so it can be added as a Task child next (the current operation creates the Project node).
